sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Genesis port

special_mechanics.name: Flight Control
special_mechanics.description: Player character is constantly flying and can move in eight directions freely via joystick. Not a jump-based platformer but a flight-based shooter.

special_mechanics.name: Rotation & Aiming
special_mechanics.description: Character can be rotated independently of movement direction to aim in 16 directions. Rotation via rotatable button on arcade controls, or A/C buttons on Genesis version.

special_mechanics.name: Satellite Module
special_mechanics.description: Orbiting satellite provides backup firepower when player fires. Can be rotated and repositioned independently around the player character.

special_mechanics.name: Megacrush Attack
special_mechanics.description: Rapid rotation of switch/button causes megacrush attack that destroys all on-screen enemies at cost of vitality gauge portion.

tier_notes: Tier 2 data - Forgotten Worlds is a scrolling shooter (shmup) with flight mechanics, not a traditional platformer. No jump physics, gravity values, or sub-pixel data are applicable or documented. Player movement is flight-based with 8-directional control. Genesis control scheme adapted arcade's rotatable button to A/C button combinations.
